name: Axis Flipkart Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹2,00,000 in the previous year

redemptionOptions: Automatic cashback credited as Flipkart SuperCoins or statement credit

welcomeBenefits.description: ₹500 Flipkart gift voucher on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: Credited within 30 days of first transaction

additionalBenefits: 5% unlimited cashback on Flipkart - no monthly cap
4% cashback on Myntra and 2GUD for fashion shopping
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
1.5% base cashback on all other spends
pros: 5% unlimited cashback on Flipkart is best-in-class for Flipkart shoppers

1.5% base cashback on all other spends is above average

faqs.question: Is the 5% Flipkart cashback really unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% cashback on Flipkart purchases has no monthly or annual cap. Every rupee spent on Flipkart earns 5% cashback without any limit.

faqs.question: How is the cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is typically credited as Flipkart SuperCoins or as a direct statement credit within 1-2 billing cycles of the transaction.

faqs.question: Does the 5% cashback work on Flipkart sale events?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% cashback applies on all Flipkart purchases including Big Billion Days, Republic Day sales, and other Flipkart sale events.

faqs.question: How do I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year and the ₹500 annual fee is waived for the following year.
